sightingForm.needContactOrMessage: Leave a contact or a message.
sightingForm.sendFailed: Could not send. Please try again.
sightingForm.doneTitle: ✅ Thank you. We sent your tip to the person who reported them; they'll contact you soon.
sightingForm.intro: Do you recognize this person or did you find them? Leave your details and a message; we'll pass them to whoever reported them (only that person will see your information).
sightingForm.openButton: ✋ I recognize them / I found them
sightingForm.messagePlaceholder: Where did you see them? How are they?

requestResponseForm.needContactOrMessage: Leave a contact or a message.
requestResponseForm.sendFailed: Could not send. Please try again.
requestResponseForm.doneTitle: ✅ Thank you! We sent your offer to the person who requested it; they'll contact you soon.
requestResponseForm.intro: Can you cover this need? Leave your details and a message; we'll pass them to whoever asked (only that person will see your information).
requestResponseForm.messagePlaceholder: How can you help? When are you available?

manageControls.updateFailedRetry: Could not update. Please try again.
manageControls.saveLinkNotice: 🔑 Save your private link to manage this report (mark it resolved later). Do not share it.

guideInvitePopup.title: Thank you for joining in!
guideInvitePopup.body: Download our guide with more ways to help earthquake victims and how to bring others on board.
